    "About": [
      "それは犬が機械仕掛けのおとりを追いかけることについてです。"

      "それは犬の成長中の関節に影響を与えます。"

      "それはファストCATと呼ばれる100ヤードのタイムドダッシュを持っています。",
      "それはライブコーシングをシミュレートすることを意図したパターンを持っています。",
      "それは最小限のターンの数を持っています。",
      "それは公式の国内および国際的なルアーコーシングトライアルのためのコーシングライセンスまたはレーシングライセンスを持っています。",
      "それはスピード、敏捷性、持久力、熱意、追従性に基づいた数値スコアを受け取ります。",

      "それは各基準に与えられる最大ポイント数を持っています。"
    ],

      "それはサイトハウンドにとって追いかける欲求が本能的であるという特徴があります。"

      "それはイタリアのルゼルナで開催されました。",
      "それはフィンランドのヘルシンキで開催されました。"
    ],

      "それは2015年6月6日と7日に開催されました。"

      "それは競技です。",
      "それはトライアルです。",
      "それはタイムド100ヤードダッシュです。",

      "それはスポーツです。",
      "それはステークです。",
      "それはチャンピオンシップです。",
      "それはカップ競技です。"

      "それはタイトルとして使用されます。",

      "それは競技に使用されます。",
      "それは獲物が方向を変えることをシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それは通常の精神的および身体的発達を刺激するために使用されます。",
      "それは犬が熱意を持って肉体的にパフォーマンスを発揮する能力を準備および向上させるために使用されます。",

      "それは公式の国内および国際的なルアーコーシングトライアルで使用されます。",

      "それは機械仕掛けのおとりを追いかけるために使用されます。",
      "それはライブコーシングをシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それは獲物が方向を変えることをシミュレートするために使用されます。",
      "それは犬がおとりを熱意を持って追いかけることを奨励するために使用されます。",

      "それはQCを獲得するために使用されます。",
      "それはジュニアコーサータイトルを獲得するために使用されます。",

About: It is about dogs chasing a mechanically operated lure.
Affects: It affects a dog's developing joints.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with sighthound breeds.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the sport of dogs.
CausedBy: It is caused by the hard fast turns that are tough on a dog's developing joints.
ConsistsOf: It consists of chasing a mechanically operated lure.
HasA: It has a pass/fail trial for all breeds called the Coursing Ability Test.
It has a timed 100 yard dash called Fast CAT.
It has a pattern that is meant to simulate live coursing.
It has a minimum number of turns.
It has a coursing licence or racing licence for official national and international lure coursing trials.
It has a numerical score based on speed, agility, endurance, enthusiasm, and follow.
It has a maximum score of 100 points in ASFA trials.
It has a maximum score of 50 points in AKC trials.
It has five criteria: Speed, Enthusiasm, Intelligence, Agility, Endurance.
It has a maximum number of points to be given for each criterion.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by the desire to chase being instinctual for sighthounds.
HeldIn: It was held in Dunakeszi, Hungary.
It was held in Pouch, Germany.
It was held in Luserna, Italy.
It was held in Helsinki, Finland.
HeldOn: It was held on 6 and 7 June 2015.
IsA: It is a sport for dogs.
It is a timed 100 yard dash.
KnownAs: It is known as Fast CAT.
KnownFor: It is known for involving dogs chasing a mechanically operated lure.
PartOf: It is part of the sport of dogs.
PerformedBy: It was performed by any non-sighthound dogs.
UsedAs: It is used as a simulation of live coursing.
It is used as a way to convert a dog's speed to points.
It is used as a title.
It is used as a prefix title.
It is used as a suffix title.
UsedFor: It is used for competition.
It is used for simulating prey changing direction.
It is used for stimulating normal mental and physical development.
It is used for preparing and improving a dog's capacity to perform physically with enthusiasm.
It is used for earning a QC.
It is used for earning a JC title.
It is used for earning a Field Champion title.
It is used for earning a Lure Courser of Merit title.
It is used for earning a Field Champion prefix title.
It is used for earning a Lure Courser Excellent suffix title.
UsedIn: It is used in lure coursing trials.
It is used in official national and international lure coursing trials.
It is used in AKC coursing.
It is used in ASFA competitions.
It is used in AKC trials.
It is used in international lure coursing trials.
It is used in official national and international lure coursing trials.
It is used in international trials.
It is used in regular trials.
It is used in AKC lure coursing points.
UsedTo: It is used to chase a mechanically operated lure.
It is used to simulate live coursing.
It is used to simulate prey changing direction.
It is used to encourage dogs to follow an artificial object with enthusiasm.
It is used to certify a dog.
It is used to earn a QC.
It is used to earn a Junior Courser title.
It is used to compete against other dogs.
It is used to earn a Field Champion title.
It is used to earn a Lure Courser Excellent suffix title.
